AccountSign in
Security readiness

Secure the marketplace before launch.

Review Supabase Auth, RLS, protected RPCs, storage rules, checkout validation, and deployment redirects before customers begin ordering.

Priority

High before launch

Complete these checks before accepting real customer orders or farmer submissions.

Security

Security audit

Launch checklist for Supabase Auth, RLS, storage, admin RPCs, checkout validation, and production web deployment.

Protect access

Keep customer, farmer, and admin routes backed by Supabase Auth and RLS policies.

Validate server-side

Sensitive actions should be checked in SQL functions, policies, and database rules.

Test before launch

Confirm checkout, auth redirects, admin actions, and order access before going public.

Critical

Environment variables

Supabase URL and anon key should live in .env.local. Service-role keys must never be exposed in browser code, client components, or public repositories.

Critical

RLS policies

Customer, admin, farmer, support, review, notification, order, payout, and profile policies should be enforced server-side in Supabase.

Critical

Protected admin RPCs

Functions such as admin_update_product, admin_upsert_coupon, and admin_fetch_audit_logs should validate admin access inside SQL before returning or changing data.

Critical

Checkout integrity

secure_checkout and secure_checkout_with_coupon should validate stock, product status, prices, coupons, customer identity, and order totals before creating an order.

Required

Storage bucket

The product-images bucket should allow intended public reads while restricting uploads and updates to approved admins or verified farmers.

Required

Auth redirects

Register deployed /auth/callback and /reset-password URLs in Supabase Auth settings for local development and production domains.

Critical

Order access

Customers should only read their own orders, order items, notifications, support tickets, subscriptions, and saved profile information.

Recommended

Launch review

Before production release, test sign-up, login, magic links, password reset, checkout, order detail loading, admin routes, and farmer approval workflows.

Launch checklist

Must-check items before production

Supabase Auth callback URL is registered
Reset password URL is registered
RLS is enabled on protected tables
Admin RPCs validate admin role in SQL
Checkout RPC returns the created order ID
Customers cannot read another customer order
Farmers cannot approve their own products
Product image uploads are role-restricted
Important warning

Frontend checks are not enough.

Buttons, hidden pages, and client-side route guards improve the user experience, but they do not secure the database by themselves. Sensitive actions must be protected by Supabase Auth, RLS policies, RPC validation, and role checks.

Never expose service-role keys in client code.
Never trust prices, stock, coupons, or totals sent from the browser.
Never rely only on hidden admin links to protect admin data.
Trust CenterContact support

Final production note

This page is a launch checklist. It does not prove the app is secure by itself. Before public release, test each Supabase policy, RPC, storage rule, and protected route using customer, farmer, admin, and signed-out accounts.
